title: [codereview-pass3-robustness-3] Time-provider interaction and IETF style nits in new SFN subsection
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:125-150. New SFN wrap text uses good IETF keywords but misses explicit MUST for all nodes to use same modulo semantics in hash (cross-ref to draft-lichen-tdma). Time-provider interaction (ts validation against epoch_floor on wrap) not detailed. Desync recovery not yet a full FSM. P2. This completes first set of 3 codereviews after chunk 1. Do not close epic until all 3 passes clean.
close_reason: Completed 3 codereview passes on SFN subsection in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md: fixed time-provider epoch_floor independence from SFN wrap (detailed validation, atomic transitions), explicit MUST for identical uint32 modulo semantics in all hash/rendezvous (RFC 1982 + draft-lichen-tdma cross-ref), IETF style nits (Section refs, full RFC 2119, consistent |drift| notation, FSM completeness). 3 review beads created/fixed/closed per chunk. No P0/P1/P2 remaining.
